title: Mitrophyllum scutatum
taxonomy: Mitrophyllum scutatum is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Aizoaceae, commonly known as the ice plant family. It belongs to the genus Mitrophyllum and is native to southern Africa. The plant's classification is further supported by its characteristics, such as its small, white flowers and fleshy leaves. The Aizoaceae family is a large and diverse group of succulent plants, many of which are endemic to southern Africa. Within the Aizoaceae family, Mitrophyllum scutatum is a relatively small genus with a limited number of species.
